ConversationMomentInsights.title: Conversation Moment Insights
ConversationMomentInsights.description: A list of Apex objects that contain insights from specific conversations during video or voice calls, such as pricing discussions or mentions of keywords about products or competitors. If no insights are found, the list remains empty.

ConversationInsights.title: Conversation Insights
ConversationInsights.description: A list of Apex objects that contain insights related to the overall content of video or voice calls, such as generative conversation insights.

LatestVideoOrVoiceCallRecordId.title: Video or Voice Call ID
LatestVideoOrVoiceCallRecordId.description: The record ID for the video or voice call related to the conversation.

LatestVideoOrVoiceCallCreatedDate.title: Video or Voice Call Created Date
LatestVideoOrVoiceCallCreatedDate.description: The date that the video or voice call related to the conversation was created.
